open_data.evidence: Expert judgments and evidence-conflict annotations are domain- and attribution-sensitive; no licensed committed dataset currently supports a reproducible general-purpose synthesis snapshot.
open_data.next_action: Add an appropriately licensed calibration or evidence-synthesis dataset with provenance and bias-adjustment permissions.
open_data.license_gate: Confirm permissions for expert-level metadata, source attribution, and derived synthesis transforms.

parity_rationale: The Python implementation is the reference runtime; cross-language parity is deferred until elicitation and conflict-adjustment semantics are reviewed.
external_gates: Cross-language conformance and Rust parity review
